one_time_description: CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative contribution of $32,376,796 to Hiyam for construction of 80 units of modular affordable housing
economic_notes: Nation reorganized commercial entities under Nch'Kay Development Limited Partnership effective June 1, 2021. MST Development Corporation partnership (33% share) developing Jericho lands with purchase obligations of $18.63M in Nov 2022 and $105.57M in Nov 2023. Multiple marina, forestry, gas, and RV park enterprises operating. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative for 80 modular units of affordable housing underway.
notes: Complex consolidation: fully consolidates Nch'Kay Development LP, Hiyam Housing Society, Spo7ez (50% proportionate), MST Development Corp (33% proportionate), Newhaven group, Nchu'7mut Contracting LP, Youth Centre, and other inactive entities. Nine GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. Corporate reorganization effective June 1, 2021 transferred commercial entity LP units to Nch'Kay. Squamish Nation Trust ($92.5M settlement fund) is excluded from consolidation. Large CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative deferred capital contribution of $28.7M on balance sheet. Significant Jericho land purchase commitments of $124.2M in future years via MST partnerships. Nation is located in BC (Vancouver area).
